headline: Humana (HUM) Valuation Check After A Volatile Stretch In Recent Share Price Performance
summary: Humana (HUM) is back on investor radar after a sharp share price swing, with the stock up about 21% over the past month but showing a 25% decline over the past three months. See our latest analysis for Humana. At the current share price of US$205.14, Humana’s recent 21% 1 month share price return contrasts with a 25% 3 month decline and a 22% year to date share price fall. At the same time, the 1 year total shareholder return of 21% and 3 year total shareholder return of 57% highlight how...
